overview.description: The NovaTide Flexible Allocation ETF (NMBL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation by investing across asset classes and global markets. Investments span equities, fixed income, and commodities from countries worldwide, including emerging markets. NMBL was launched on Oct 31, 2025 and is issued by NovaTide.
